changelog: Restored Search in the side rail. The Search item was being clipped off the bottom of the rail on standard 540 dp TV displays because all 7 items + Settings exceeded the available column height. Tightened item height (54 → 48 dp) and inter-item spacing (6 → 4 dp), trimmed brand-mark padding, and wrapped the items column in verticalScroll as a safety net so the rail never silently hides an entry on smaller screens.
